content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: AuthZbypass:x-user-idacceptsspoofedID ⇒ "Sendrequestwith'x-user-id'header containingvictim'sID"
P: drop_hdr(x-user-id) → hdr_override(x-user-id) → spoof_denied(x-user-id)
V: Checkifrequestwithspoofed'x-user-id'isblocked ∧ Verifyifresponseis'401'
R: ! AuthZbypass ∧ ! Infodisclosure
A: authz_bypass

[AUDIT]
Treat AuthZbypass:x-user-idacceptsspoofedID as a header auth risk, apply drop hdr(x-user-id), and verify spoofed requests fail.
